description_long: This is a polygonal, octagonal barrel with a slightly tapered lower half and a wider, flat-topped upper section. The main body is a matte brown color, segmented by vertical edges, giving it a faceted appearance. Around its midsection, there is a distinct, dark band that appears to serve as a structural reinforcement or decorative element. The top surface is flat and solid, with no visible opening or lid mechanism. There are no handles, spouts, or visible markings on any side. The overall design suggests a utilitarian container, likely used for storage or as a decorative urban object.
description: A faceted, brown octagonal barrel with a flat top and a dark reinforcing band around its middle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, faceted body and the prominent dark band at the midsection.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the tapering lower half and the polygonal structure of the barrel.
description_view_2: Direct side view highlights the even width of the dark band and the flatness of the top surface.
description_view_3: Another angled view, similar to view 1, showing the faceted sides and the continuous band.
